n: Book 14, Chapter 1: The Long Road South

steps.t: Laerdan is at the Last Homely House in Rivendell. You should return at once to Laerdan with news of your successes, but also of the resulting delays.
Elrond is in his library in the Last Homely House at Rivendell. You should tell Elrond of Laerdan's note at once.
